summary: MEGA PROMPT #34 - Multi Accounting Provider Architecture: All Backend APIs Pass (18/18), Frontend Fully Functional. Tested: Provider catalog (4 providers), capability matrix, Luca config CRUD, connection test (simulated mode), credential rotation, health dashboard, RBAC (agency_admin blocked from config), Redis health.
critical_code_review_comments: BaseAccountingProvider (base_provider.py): Well-designed abstract contract with 7 methods (test_connection, create_customer, get_customer, create_invoice, cancel_invoice, get_invoice_status, download_invoice_pdf). Normalized ProviderResponse with standard error codes.

CapabilityMatrix (capability_matrix.py): Clean provider definitions with capabilities (customer_management, invoice_creation, invoice_cancel, status_polling, pdf_download, webhook_support), rate limits, credential field schemas. Only Luca is_active=True.
LucaProvider (luca_provider.py): Active provider with full implementation. Graceful fallback to simulation mode when Luca API is unreachable. Proper payload builders for Luca-specific format.
StubProviders (logo/parasut/mikro_provider.py): Properly return ERR_UNSUPPORTED with Turkish error message. Ready for future implementation.
ProviderRouting (provider_routing.py): Tenant→provider mapping with credential encryption (AES-256-GCM). One tenant = one active provider constraint enforced. Masked credentials in responses.
ProviderHealth (provider_health.py): Health event tracking, aggregated metrics (24h/1h), ProviderTimer context manager for latency tracking.
ProviderFailover (provider_failover.py): Retry→Queue→Manual escalation strategy. RETRYABLE_ERRORS set with backoff schedule (5s, 30s, 2m, 10m, 1h).
Router RBAC (accounting_providers.py): Proper role separation - ALLOWED_ROLES for read (includes agency_admin), WRITE_ROLES (super_admin, admin, finance_admin) for config/test/rotate/delete.
Credential Masking: Only sensitive fields (password, sifre, secret, api_key, username) are masked. company_id is NOT masked which is correct design.
seed_data_creation: Luca provider configured for admin tenant with demo credentials (demo_user/demo_pass/FIRMA001)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEGA PROMPT #34 Multi Accounting Provider Architecture fully tested. Features: 1) Provider Catalog - GET /api/accounting/providers/catalog returns 4 providers (luca active, logo/parasut/mikro stubs). 2) Provider Config - POST/GET/DELETE /api/accounting/providers/config with credential encryption and masking. 3) Connection Test - POST /api/accounting/providers/test-connection (returns simulated status when Luca API unreachable). 4) Credential Rotation - POST /api/accounting/providers/rotate-credentials. 5) Health Dashboard - GET /api/accounting/providers/health with tenant_providers, metrics_24h, metrics_1h. 6) RBAC enforced - agency_admin can view catalog but NOT configure. Redis running on localhost:6379.

backend_apis.GET /api/accounting/providers/catalog: PASS - Returns 4 providers (luca, logo, parasut, mikro) with capability matrix
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/providers/config (l: PASS - Configures Luca provider with encrypted credentials
PASS - Returns 400 (Logo entegrasyonu henuz aktif degil)

backend_apis.DELETE /api/accounting/providers/config: PASS - Removes provider config, verified with GET
backend_apis.GET /api/accounting/providers/health: PASS - Returns tenant_providers, metrics_24h, metrics_1h, available_providers

frontend_ui.Current Config Section: PASS - Shows provider name, last test, update time, updater email
